note: As-is baseline (before) of the board render path the redesign touches: viewBoard → header 'gogo cockpit — N features' → renderColumn ×4 (columnHeader '▸ plan (3)', renderCard 3 rows: mark+slug+● session / title / badge; changelog uses the SAME renderCard boxes) → boardStatusLine → static help line. Scoped to what the change modifies.

diagrams.title: Current board render flow (before): (N)-count headers, plain-text badges, full-card changelog, static help line
